parameters.jsCode:
return [
  { json: { feed_url: 'https://importai.substack.com/feed',               name: 'Import AI',              priority: 'high'   } },
  { json: { feed_url: 'https://www.oneusefulthing.org/feed',              name: 'One Useful Thing',       priority: 'high'   } },
  { json: { feed_url: 'https://aisnakeoil.substack.com/feed',            name: 'AI Snake Oil',           priority: 'high'   } },
  { json: { feed_url: 'https://www.latent.space/feed',                   name: 'Latent Space',           priority: 'high'   } },
  { json: { feed_url: 'https://www.marketingaiinstitute.com/blog/rss.xml', name: 'Marketing AI Institute', priority: 'medium' } },
];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-6", max_tokens: 8000, system: [{ type: "text", text: "You extract content ideas from newsletter articles for Alec Foster. Alec is Chief AI Architect & Responsible AI Lead at Marketing + Media Alliance (MMA). Audience: marketers, AI practitioners, execs/CMOs, governance folks, builders. Alec's interests: Claude (all Anthropic products), Claude Code, agentic AI, AI governance, responsible AI, AI safety, AI ethics, privacy, marketing AI, advertising personalization, adtech, measurement, enterprise AI, MCP, prompt engineering, LLM evals, AI strategy for CMOs, MMA frameworks, Codex.

Yield 0-2 ideas per article only when there is substantive content Alec could amplify, counter, or build on for his LinkedIn audience. Return {"ideas": []} if the article is thin, off-topic, or purely promotional.

For each idea return: topic_headline, hook, key_points (3-5), observations (1-3), tips (0-3), quotes (1-2 verbatim from the article), hot_take_potential (High/Medium/Low), utility (High/Medium/Low), relevance (High/Medium/Low), format (Explainer/Hot Take/Listicle/Case Study/Opinion/Thread), topics (from the allowed list), audience, draft_angle, why_it_matters, further_reading.

Allowed topics: Claude, Agents, AI Governance, Marketing AI, Measurement, AI Strategy, LLMs, MCP, Voice AI, AI Safety, Enterprise AI, Creator Economy, Policy, Research, Content, Prompt Engineering, Reddit/Search, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Codex.

Banned words: Unlock, Unleash, Synergy, Uncover, Furthermore, Leverage, Landscape, Delve, Prowess, Realm, Unearth, Tapestry, Crucial, Pivotal, Revolutionary, Lifeblood, Treasure trove, Dive into, Game-changing, Cutting edge, Empower. No em-dashes.

Output strict JSON only: {"ideas": [...]} or {"ideas": []}.", cache_control: { type: "ephemeral" } }], messages: [{ role: "user", content: "Extract content ideas from this newsletter article.

Feed: " + ($json.article_feed || "") + "
Title: " + ($json.article_title || "") + "
Published: " + ($json.article_published || "") + "
URL: " + ($json.article_url || "") + "

ARTICLE CONTENT:
" + ($json.article_markdown || "(no content scraped)") }] }) }}
